import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Footer = () => { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); return (
{/* School Info */}

🏫 Podar International School

Khadgoan Ring Road

Latur, Maharashtra

📍 India

{/* Event Info */}

⚡ Spark 4.0

  • 📅 Science Fair 2026-27
  • 🎯 Grades 4-10
  • 🏆 9 Divisions
  • 👨‍🏫 8 Projects per Class
{/* Quick Links */}

🔗 Quick Links

  • 📝 Register
  • 🔐 Login
  • 🔧 Admin
  • 📋 Rules & Guidelines
{/* Contact */}

📞 Contact Us

  • 📱 +91-98765-43210
  • 📧 sciencefair@podar.edu
  • 🕐 Mon-Fri: 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM
{/* Bottom Bar */}

© {currentYear} Podar International School, Latur. All Rights Reserved.

Designed with ❤️ for ⚡ Spark 4.0 · Science Fair 2026-27

); }; export default Footer;
